description:
fz dump (fz-ul4.23.3) emits per-fn CLIF but without source-loc interleaving. The user-stated goal was \"annotated with source / line numbers\" so callers can map generated code back to fz source while iterating.

## Deliverable

- ir_codegen sets `SourceLoc` on every emitted instruction. Encode `Span` into u32 (file_id << 24 | offset, or similar packing — Cranelift gives us 32 bits).
- The dump pretty-printer interleaves `; @file:line:col` comments before instructions whose srcloc resolves through diag::SourceMap.
- Multi-file source maps: dump output needs to know the SourceMap. Either pass the map to compile, or stamp file_ids deterministically.

## Acceptance

- `fz dump --emit clif fixtures/add1.fz` produces CLIF with source-loc comments.
- The fz dump test asserts srcloc presence for at least one fn body inst.
title: Source-loc annotations in fz dump output
